title: Components
description: Function components, naming rules, and rendering.

questions.prompt: React component names MUST start with:
questions.explanation: Lowercase = DOM element (h1, div). Capital = user component.

questions.prompt: How many times does the console log when App renders once?
questions.explanation: Each instance runs its function body.

questions.prompt: In modern React, a component is:
options: A pure function of props and state
questions.explanation: Function components + hooks are the norm.

questions.prompt: Should components have side effects during render?
options: No — render should be pure. Side effects go in event handlers or effects
questions.explanation: Render must be pure. React may render multiple times without commit.

questions.prompt: Why does StrictMode double-invoke components in dev?
options: To surface impure render logic and effect bugs early
questions.explanation: Only in dev. Production runs each render once.

options: No — arrow can't be a component
questions.explanation: Arrow with implicit return is fine.
